name: E. Schnapp & Co. Works Ltd
summary: E. Schnapp & Co. Works Ltd manufactures and sells batteries for vehicles. The company offers car, start and stop, motorcycle, and ATV batteries; battery accumulators; solar fire detection UPS backup batteries; washing machine batteries; and chargers and battery testers, as well as batteries for plateau levels, cinema and electric vehicles, and trailers and boats. It also exports its products internationally. The company serves various government ministries, the Ministry of Defense, IDF, military and air industries, and Israeli ports; and electricity, bus, and rental and leasing companies, as well as companies that import cars to Israel. E. Schnapp & Co. Works Ltd was founded in 1951 and is headquartered in Netanya, Israel.
